feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: KONI Beri Bantuan Ratusan Pelatih dan Atlet

link.title: KONI Beri Bantuan Ratusan Pelatih dan Atlet

entry.content:
PEKALONGAN, KOMPAS.TV - Pemberian bantuan kepada 416 atlet dan pelatih oleh Koni Kabupaten Pekalongan ini bekerjasama dengan salah satu Bank Daerah. Para atlet dan pelatih diberikan bantuan langsung melalui rekening langsung.
Rata-rata atlet dan pelatih mendapatkan bantuan uang senilai RP 300 Ribu sampai RP 400 Ribu. Dalam kegiatan ini Bupati Pekalongan didampingi ketua Koni Kabupaten Pekalongan Eko Ahmadi menyerahkan secara simbolis buku rekening dan ATM kepada dua atlet dan satu pelatih.
Ketua Koni Kabupaten Pekalongan Eko Ahmadi menjelaskan bantuan kepada atlet dan pelatih guna memberikan semangat kepada mereka supaya tetap bisa berlatih dan beraktivitas di masa Pandemi. Pemerintah daerah melalui Koni Kabupaten Pekalongan akan berusaha mengurusi atlet dan pelatih, sehingga nantinya diharapkan tidak ada alasan lagi bagi mereka untuk tidak berprestasi.
Koni Kabupaten Pekalongan berharap atlet dan pelatih harus bisa mempersembahkan prestasi, karen pada tahun 2021 sesuai rencana akan membangun sport center untuk kegiatan olahraga di Kabupaten Pekalongan.
#KONI #Olahraga #Bantuan
entry.summary: PEKALONGAN, KOMPAS.TV - Pemberian bantuan kepada 416 atlet dan pelatih oleh Koni Kabupaten Pekalongan ini bekerjasama dengan salah satu Bank Daerah. Para atlet dan pelatih diberikan bantuan langsung melalui rekening langsung. Rata-rata atlet dan pelatih mendapatkan bantuan uang senilai RP 300 Ribu sampai RP 400 Ribu. Dalam kegiatan ini Bupati Pekalongan didampingi ketua Koni Kabupaten Pekalongan Eko Ahmadi menyerahkan secara simbolis buku rekening dan ATM kepada dua atlet dan satu pelatih. Ketua Koni Kabupaten Pekalongan Eko Ahmadi menjelaskan bantuan kepada atlet dan pelatih guna memberikan semangat kepada mereka supaya tetap bisa berlatih dan beraktivitas di masa Pandemi. Pemerintah daerah melalui Koni Kabupaten Pekalongan akan berusaha mengurusi atlet dan pelatih, sehingga nantinya diharapkan tidak ada alasan lagi bagi mereka untuk tidak berprestasi. Koni Kabupaten Pekalongan berharap atlet dan pelatih harus bisa mempersembahkan prestasi, karen pada tahun 2021 sesuai rencana akan membangun sport center untuk kegiatan olahraga di Kabupaten Pekalongan. #KONI #Olahraga #Bantuan

entry.title: Case against Roger Ng will continue, prosecution says despite dropping charges against Goldman Sachs

link.title: Case against Roger Ng will continue, prosecution says despite dropping charges against Goldman Sachs

entry.content:
The prosecution intends to proceed with its criminal case against former Goldman Sachs banker Roger Ng, even as it dropped all charges against three Goldman Sachs companies over the sale of US$6.5 billion (RM27 billion) worth of 1Malaysia Development Berhad (1MDB) bonds.
Earlier on Friday, the High Court in Kuala Lumpur granted a discharge and acquittal on the four charges involving Goldman Sachs and its two Asian entities.
Read more at
WATCH MORE:
SUBSCRIBE:
LIKE:
entry.summary: The prosecution intends to proceed with its criminal case against former Goldman Sachs banker Roger Ng, even as it dropped all charges against three Goldman Sachs companies over the sale of US$6.5 billion (RM27 billion) worth of 1Malaysia Development Berhad (1MDB) bonds. Earlier on Friday, the High Court in Kuala Lumpur granted a discharge and acquittal on the four charges involving Goldman Sachs and its two Asian entities. Read more at WATCH MORE: SUBSCRIBE: LIKE:

entry.title: Luca Sbardella - Luca Sbardella Montreal Tv Lazio

link.title: Luca Sbardella - Luca Sbardella Montreal Tv Lazio

entry.content:
Per gli amici di Montreal non poteva mancare in rappresentanza della Regione Lazio , il mitico Luca Sbardella con una classico Romanesco .

entry.title: M2, con Susana Moscatel Alondra de la Parra y Elisa Carrillo, ‘La orquesta imposible’

link.title: M2, con Susana Moscatel Alondra de la Parra y Elisa Carrillo, ‘La orquesta imposible’

entry.content:
La directora de orquesta Alondra de la Parra y Elisa Carrillo se unen en la iniciativa"‘La Orquesta Imposible" a fin de poder recaudar recursos para apoyar a mujeres y niños de sectores vulnerables ante la crisis económica provocada por la covid-19.
#MilenioHey! #M2
entry.summary: La directora de orquesta Alondra de la Parra y Elisa Carrillo se unen en la iniciativa"‘La Orquesta Imposible" a fin de poder recaudar recursos para apoyar a mujeres y niños de sectores vulnerables ante la crisis económica provocada por la covid-19. #MilenioHey! #M2

entry.title: Sushant के बच्चे की मां बनने पर बोली Rhea Chakraborty, मुझे छोटा Sushi चाहिए FilmiBeat

link.title: Sushant के बच्चे की मां बनने पर बोली Rhea Chakraborty, मुझे छोटा Sushi चाहिए FilmiBeat

entry.content:
Sushant’s girlfriend Rhea Chakraborty wanted child with him. Watch the video to know more about this !
#SushantSinghRajput #RheaChakraborty #RheaWantedSushantChild

entry.title: Video of The Day: Fairuz A Rafiq Keguguran, Curhat Sedih Suami Akun IG Vannesa Angel Hilang

link.title: Video of The Day: Fairuz A Rafiq Keguguran, Curhat Sedih Suami Akun IG Vannesa Angel Hilang

entry.content:
Berikut ini rangkuman video artis paling hot pada Jumat (4/9/2020), di antaranya: Fairuz A Rafiq mengalami keguguran, Bibi Ardiansyah sedih karena akun Instagram Vanessa Angel hilang.
1. Fairuz A Rafiq Keguguran, Sonny Septian Minta Dikuatkan
Kabar kurang baik kini sedang menerpa rumah tangga pasangan Fairuz A Rafiq dan Sonny Septian. Melalui Instagramnya, Sonny Septian mengumumkan jika sang istri baru saja keguguran.
Baca selengkapnya
2. Bingung IG Vanessa Angel Hilang, Suami: Disitu Keluarga Kami Cari Uang
Bibi Ardiansyah mengungkapkan kesedihannya karena akun istrinya, Vanessa Angel menghilang. Karena akun tersebut digunakan keluarga mereka untuk mencari nafkah lewat endorse.
Baca selengkapnya
3. Dihujat Usai Sebut Polusi Visual, Revina VT: Silahkan Mau Benci atau Jijik
Ramai dihujat netizen, Revina VTmelakukan pembelaan bahwa apa yang ia lakukan itu merupakan bagian dari kebebasan berpendapat. Lewat unggahan Instagram-nya, Revina menuliskan penjelasan terkait cuitannya di Twitter yang menyebut polusi visual.
Baca selengkapnya
4. Mak Jleb! Krisdayanti Ngaku Tak Tahu dan Nggak Kenal Atta Halilintar
Krisdayanti menegaskan tidak mengenal sosok Atta Halilintar. Bahkan, dia juga menyebut tidak tahu bagaimana karakter asli sulung sebelas bersaudara ini.
Baca selengkapnya
5. Jaka Hidayat eks Drummer BIP Ungkap Alasan Pakai Sabu
Saat gelar perkara, Jaka Hidayat eks drummber BIP mengungkapkan alasannya memakai sabu. Ia mengaku saat itu sedang kangen karena sudah lama berhenti. Naas malah tertangkap polisi.
Baca selengkapnya
entry.summary: Berikut ini rangkuman video artis paling hot pada Jumat (4/9/2020), di antaranya: Fairuz A Rafiq mengalami keguguran, Bibi Ardiansyah sedih karena akun Instagram Vanessa Angel hilang. 1. Fairuz A Rafiq Keguguran, Sonny Septian Minta Dikuatkan Kabar kurang baik kini sedang menerpa rumah tangga pasangan Fairuz A Rafiq dan Sonny Septian. Melalui Instagramnya, Sonny Septian mengumumkan jika sang istri baru saja keguguran. Baca selengkapnya 2. Bingung IG Vanessa Angel Hilang, Suami: Disitu Keluarga Kami Cari Uang Bibi Ardiansyah mengungkapkan kesedihannya karena akun istrinya, Vanessa Angel menghilang. Karena akun tersebut digunakan keluarga mereka untuk mencari nafkah lewat endorse. Baca selengkapnya 3. Dihujat Usai Sebut Polusi Visual, Revina VT: Silahkan Mau Benci atau Jijik Ramai dihujat netizen, Revina VTmelakukan pembelaan bahwa apa yang ia lakukan itu merupakan bagian dari kebebasan berpendapat. Lewat unggahan Instagram-nya, Revina menuliskan penjelasan terkait cuitannya di Twitter yang menyebut polusi visual. Baca selengkapnya 4. Mak Jleb! Krisdayanti Ngaku Tak Tahu dan Nggak Kenal Atta Halilintar Krisdayanti menegaskan tidak mengenal sosok Atta Halilintar. Bahkan, dia juga menyebut tidak tahu bagaimana karakter asli sulung sebelas bersaudara ini. Baca selengkapnya 5. Jaka Hidayat eks Drummer BIP Ungkap Alasan Pakai Sabu Saat gelar perkara, Jaka Hidayat eks drummber BIP mengungkapkan alasannya memakai sabu. Ia mengaku saat itu sedang kangen karena sudah lama berhenti. Naas malah tertangkap polisi. Baca selengkapnya

entry.title: Biden Visits Kenosha To Meet With Jacob Blake’s Family Days After Trump’s Kenosha Visit

link.title: Biden Visits Kenosha To Meet With Jacob Blake’s Family Days After Trump’s Kenosha Visit

entry.content:
CNN reports Democratic nominee Joe Biden is traveling to Wisconsin on Thursday.
He plans to hold a community event in Kenosha and then meet with the family of Jacob Blake.
Jacob Blake is the 29-year-old Black man who was recently shot in the back seven times by police.
Biden’s trip comes two days after President Donald Trump visited Wisconsin.
Trump did not speak or meet with the family of Jacob Blake on his trip.
Biden and Sen. Kamala Harris, have both spoken with Blake’s family prior to the trip.
entry.summary: CNN reports Democratic nominee Joe Biden is traveling to Wisconsin on Thursday. He plans to hold a community event in Kenosha and then meet with the family of Jacob Blake. Jacob Blake is the 29-year-old Black man who was recently shot in the back seven times by police. Biden’s trip comes two days after President Donald Trump visited Wisconsin. Trump did not speak or meet with the family of Jacob Blake on his trip. Biden and Sen. Kamala Harris, have both spoken with Blake’s family prior to the trip.

entry.title: Comparatif photo : Galaxy Note 20 Ultra VS iPhone 11 Pro

link.title: Comparatif photo : Galaxy Note 20 Ultra VS iPhone 11 Pro

entry.content:
Saurez-vous reconnaître une photo prise par un iPhone 11 Pro VS une photo prise par un Galaxy Note 20 Ultra ?
Aujourd’hui les marques font tout pour avoir LE meilleur photophone.
Apple et Samsung ont développé, années après années, un savoir faire bien différent que nous allons détailler dans cette vidéo.
entry.summary: Saurez-vous reconnaître une photo prise par un iPhone 11 Pro VS une photo prise par un Galaxy Note 20 Ultra ? Aujourd’hui les marques font tout pour avoir LE meilleur photophone. Apple et Samsung ont développé, années après années, un savoir faire bien différent que nous allons détailler dans cette vidéo.

entry.title: Aktor Chadwick ‘Black Panther’ Boseman Tutup Usia

link.title: Aktor Chadwick ‘Black Panther’ Boseman Tutup Usia

entry.content: VIVA – Aktor Chadwick Boseman yang lebih dikenal dalam film superhero MARVEL, Black Panther meninggal dunia pada usia 43 tahun. Diketahui, Boseman sudah mengidap penyakit kanker sejak beberapa tahun lalu.
entry.summary: VIVA – Aktor Chadwick Boseman yang lebih dikenal dalam film superhero MARVEL, Black Panther meninggal dunia pada usia 43 tahun. Diketahui, Boseman sudah mengidap penyakit kanker sejak beberapa tahun lalu.

entry.title: Maharashtra में टूटे Corona के सारे Records, Arjun Kapoor हुए COVID-19 Positive वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Maharashtra में टूटे Corona के सारे Records, Arjun Kapoor हुए COVID-19 Positive वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Arjun Kapoor has tested positive for COVID-19 the actor announced in an Instagram post on Sunday. Sharing an update about his health Arjun Kapoor wrote that he is feeling okay and is asymptomatic. The actor also revealed that he has isolated himself at his home and will be under home quarantine till his recovery.
देश में कोरोनावायरस से संक्रमित लोगों के मामले लगातार बढ़ते जा रहे हैं. कोरोना से संक्रमित लोगों का आंकड़ा अब 41 लाख के पार पहुंच चुका है. अब हाल ही में एक्टर अर्जुन कपूर के कोरोना से संक्रमित होने की खबर सामने आई है. इस बात की जानकारी एक्टर ने अपने इंस्टाग्राम एकाउंट के जरिए दी है. अर्जुन कपूर ने अपने कोविड 19 पॉजिटिव होने को लेकर कहा-सबको यह बताना मेरी ड्यूटी है कि मेरा कोरोना टेस्ट पॉजिटिव आया है.
#ArjunKapoorCovid-19 #MaharashtraCovid-19 #Coronavirus
entry.summary: Arjun Kapoor has tested positive for COVID-19 the actor announced in an Instagram post on Sunday. Sharing an update about his health Arjun Kapoor wrote that he is feeling okay and is asymptomatic. The actor also revealed that he has isolated himself at his home and will be under home quarantine till his recovery. देश में कोरोनावायरस से संक्रमित लोगों के मामले लगातार बढ़ते जा रहे हैं. कोरोना से संक्रमित लोगों का आंकड़ा अब 41 लाख के पार पहुंच चुका है. अब हाल ही में एक्टर अर्जुन कपूर के कोरोना से संक्रमित होने की खबर सामने आई है. इस बात की जानकारी एक्टर ने अपने इंस्टाग्राम एकाउंट के जरिए दी है. अर्जुन कपूर ने अपने कोविड 19 पॉजिटिव होने को लेकर कहा-सबको यह बताना मेरी ड्यूटी है कि मेरा कोरोना टेस्ट पॉजिटिव आया है. #ArjunKapoorCovid-19 #MaharashtraCovid-19 #Coronavirus

entry.title: What living on Earth would be like without the moon

link.title: What living on Earth would be like without the moon

entry.content: Our moon is on the move. Each year, it drifts an estimated 1.5 inches further away from Earth. And in the process, Earth’s rotation is actually slowing down. What if one night, the moon simply disappeared? Would we miss it?
entry.summary: Our moon is on the move. Each year, it drifts an estimated 1.5 inches further away from Earth. And in the process, Earth’s rotation is actually slowing down. What if one night, the moon simply disappeared? Would we miss it?

entry.title: COVID-19 Vaccines Tracker : కరోనా టీకాలు- ఏ వ్యాక్సిన్ ఎంత, ఎప్పుడు వస్తుంది ! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: COVID-19 Vaccines Tracker : కరోనా టీకాలు- ఏ వ్యాక్సిన్ ఎంత, ఎప్పుడు వస్తుంది ! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Top COVID-19 vaccines: All You Need To Know About coronavirus Vaccines. India’s second coronavirus vaccine by Zydus Cadila gets DCGI nod for human clinical trials. Meanwhile Adar Poonawalla, Chief Executive Officer of Pune-based Serum Institute of India (SII), has said the coronavirus vaccine may be ready by the end of this year and that the final price of the anti-virus dose will be announced in two months.Patna RMRI had start phase 2 and 3 of human trials of covishield. vaccine developed by oxford university
#COVID19Vaccines
#OxfordCovid19Vaccine
#Covishield
#ZydusCadila
#DCGI
#CoronaVirus
#BharatBiotech
#AstraZeneca
#Moderna
#coronavirusvaccine
#AstraZenecaCOVID19vaccine
#covaxin
#COVID19Vaccines
#RussiaCoronaVaccine
#ChinaCoronavirusVaccine
#CanSinoBiologicsvaccine
#COVID19VaccinesTracker
#కరోనా వ్యాక్సిన్
యావత్ ప్రపంచం కరోనా వ్యాక్సిన్ కోసం ఎదురుచూస్తోంది. అయితే ఒక వ్యాక్సిన్‌ను తయారు చేయాలంటే సంవత్సరాలు పడుతుంది. కొన్నిసార్లు దశాబ్దాలు కూడా పట్టొచ్చు. అయితే కొవిడ్ టీకా మాత్రం కొన్ని నెలల్లోనే వచ్చే అవకాశం ఉందంటున్నారు సైంటిస్టులు.ఇక ఇప్పటికే చాలా కరోనా టీకాలు హ్యూమన్ ట్రైల్స్ దశలో ఉన్నాయి. ఇక ఏ వ్యాక్సిన్ ఎక్కడిదాకా వచ్చిందో ఒక్కసారి చూద్దాం
entry.summary: Top COVID-19 vaccines: All You Need To Know About coronavirus Vaccines. India’s second coronavirus vaccine by Zydus Cadila gets DCGI nod for human clinical trials. Meanwhile Adar Poonawalla, Chief Executive Officer of Pune-based Serum Institute of India (SII), has said the coronavirus vaccine may be ready by the end of this year and that the final price of the anti-virus dose will be announced in two months.Patna RMRI had start phase 2 and 3 of human trials of covishield. vaccine developed by oxford university #COVID19Vaccines #OxfordCovid19Vaccine #Covishield #ZydusCadila #DCGI #CoronaVirus #BharatBiotech #AstraZeneca #Moderna #coronavirusvaccine #AstraZenecaCOVID19vaccine #covaxin #COVID19Vaccines #RussiaCoronaVaccine #ChinaCoronavirusVaccine #CanSinoBiologicsvaccine #COVID19VaccinesTracker #కరోనా వ్యాక్సిన్ యావత్ ప్రపంచం కరోనా వ్యాక్సిన్ కోసం ఎదురుచూస్తోంది. అయితే ఒక వ్యాక్సిన్‌ను తయారు చేయాలంటే సంవత్సరాలు పడుతుంది. కొన్నిసార్లు దశాబ్దాలు కూడా పట్టొచ్చు. అయితే కొవిడ్ టీకా మాత్రం కొన్ని నెలల్లోనే వచ్చే అవకాశం ఉందంటున్నారు సైంటిస్టులు.ఇక ఇప్పటికే చాలా కరోనా టీకాలు హ్యూమన్ ట్రైల్స్ దశలో ఉన్నాయి. ఇక ఏ వ్యాక్సిన్ ఎక్కడిదాకా వచ్చిందో ఒక్కసారి చూద్దాం

entry.title: कोरोना काल में जारी है ऑनलाइन क्लास का दौर

link.title: कोरोना काल में जारी है ऑनलाइन क्लास का दौर

entry.content:
कोरोना काल ने देशभर में लगभग सभी व्यवस्थाएं ठप्प करके रख दी है। इन्हीं व्यवस्थाएं में से एक है शिक्षा व्यवस्था। कोरोना काल ने देशभर में शिक्षा व्यवस्था को भी प्रभावित कर दिया है। वहीं अब बच्चों को डिजिटल क्लास के माध्यम से पढाया जा रहा है। नतीजतन सभी सरकारी और प्राइवेट स्कूलों में बच्चों को डिजिटल क्लास मुहैया कराई जा रही है
#ONLINECLASS #STUDENTS #STUDY
entry.summary: कोरोना काल ने देशभर में लगभग सभी व्यवस्थाएं ठप्प करके रख दी है। इन्हीं व्यवस्थाएं में से एक है शिक्षा व्यवस्था। कोरोना काल ने देशभर में शिक्षा व्यवस्था को भी प्रभावित कर दिया है। वहीं अब बच्चों को डिजिटल क्लास के माध्यम से पढाया जा रहा है। नतीजतन सभी सरकारी और प्राइवेट स्कूलों में बच्चों को डिजिटल क्लास मुहैया कराई जा रही है #ONLINECLASS #STUDENTS #STUDY

entry.title: Drone footage shows dramatic moment car smashed into an unmarked police vehicle

link.title: Drone footage shows dramatic moment car smashed into an unmarked police vehicle

entry.content: Police made three arrests after the crash and the police car suffered substantial damage following the pursuit of the burglary suspects.
entry.summary: Police made three arrests after the crash and the police car suffered substantial damage following the pursuit of the burglary suspects.

entry.title: Floral tributes and teddy bears left at the scene of Coast Road Crash

link.title: Floral tributes and teddy bears left at the scene of Coast Road Crash

entry.content: A three-year-old girl has tragically died following the crash on the Coast Road between Horden and Blackhall Colliery
entry.summary: A three-year-old girl has tragically died following the crash on the Coast Road between Horden and Blackhall Colliery

entry.title: Rad And Vibrant Customs From The 1980s And 1990s

link.title: Rad And Vibrant Customs From The 1980s And 1990s

entry.content: We found a treasure trove of vibrant custom motorcycles from the Hot Bike archives that dazzle with chrome and color.
entry.summary: We found a treasure trove of vibrant custom motorcycles from the Hot Bike archives that dazzle with chrome and color.

entry.title: النجوم يدعمون حملة زهير مراد عربياً وعالمياً ✌ Rise from the ashes zuhair Murad

link.title: النجوم يدعمون حملة زهير مراد عربياً وعالمياً ✌ Rise from the ashes zuhair Murad

entry.content:
بعد انفجار الرابع من أغسطس في بيروت، تأثر الكثير من المصممين اللبنانيين من تدمير طال مشاغلهم الخاصة. ومنهم المصمم اللبناني العالمي زهير مراد الذي قام بعد تدمير مشغله بحملة عالمية لدعم المدينة معنوياً ومادياً ولتوصيل صوت الألم والوجعذي أصاب بيروت الى العالم
HIA MAGAZINE ON SOCIAL:

►Follow HiaMag on Twitter:
►Follow HiaMag on Instagram:
► Subscribe HiaMag on YouTube:
► Subscribe HiaMag on DAILYMOTION:
© All Rights Reserved. Hia Magazine - SRPC Group
entry.summary: بعد انفجار الرابع من أغسطس في بيروت، تأثر الكثير من المصممين اللبنانيين من تدمير طال مشاغلهم الخاصة. ومنهم المصمم اللبناني العالمي زهير مراد الذي قام بعد تدمير مشغله بحملة عالمية لدعم المدينة معنوياً ومادياً ولتوصيل صوت الألم والوجعذي أصاب بيروت الى العالم HIA MAGAZINE ON SOCIAL: ►Like HiaMag on Facebook: ►Follow HiaMag on Twitter: ►Follow HiaMag on Instagram: ► Subscribe HiaMag on YouTube: ► Subscribe HiaMag on DAILYMOTION: © All Rights Reserved. Hia Magazine - SRPC Group

entry.title: Naked workers forced to streak after losing a bet

link.title: Naked workers forced to streak after losing a bet

entry.content: Talk about a losing "streak." Five naked men were nabbed by police after running through the streets of Changsha, China, barely covering their private parts. The group of streakers had lost a competition against their co-workers on work productivity.
entry.summary: Talk about a losing "streak." Five naked men were nabbed by police after running through the streets of Changsha, China, barely covering their private parts. The group of streakers had lost a competition against their co-workers on work productivity.
